name: Blueberry Boy Bait
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together flour, sugar, and butter in a bowl until well combined. Set aside.
2. In another bowl, add salt, baking powder, milk, and egg yolks to the reserved mixture from step 1. Blend well.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the batter using a spatula or whisk.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9" X 11" baking pan.
6. Sprinkle blueberries evenly over the top of the batter.
7. Sprinkle the reserved mixture of flour, sugar, and butter evenly over the top layer of batter.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 40-50 minutes.
Mrs. Harold T. Cook
